steps.title: Identify what both actions create
steps.content: In both sentences, Gogol is creating a permanent, visible mark of his identity—one carved into clay, the other painted on a canvas.

steps.title: Find the word that matches this pattern
steps.content: Marks works for both verbs. Carving his name marks the clay surface, and leaving his signature marks the painting with brush strokes. The other choices—passes, turns, and follows—don't describe creating an impression. That matches choice A — A is correct.
